title: L0 Agent Capability Discovery Record
description: RFC 8615 well-known endpoint schema for agent capability advertisement. Layer 0 of the L3.5 trust spec.

root_key.description: Root identity key (e.g. ed25519:abc123). MPC agents use the group key, not individual signers.

trust_vector_endpoint.description: URL to fetch L3.5 trust receipt (JSON)

name.description: Capability type from the registry (e.g. attestation, delivery, scoring, settlement, custody)

version.description: Capability version. Version mismatch on action = re-validate.

attested_at.description: When this capability was last attested

ttl.description: Seconds until stale. 0 = always re-query. -1 = immutable declaration.

current_signers.description: For MPC agents: current signer set. Rotation changes this, not root_key.

record_version.description: Monotonically increasing. Cached records at lower version = stale.
